metadata.description: Claude Code skills for LinkedIn growth: post writing, comment drafting, algorithm audit, humanizer + AI-detector spread, profile optimizer, content planner, employee advocacy, and engagement monitoring (author replies + likers analytics).

plugins.name: linkedin-skills
plugins.description: Bundle of 10 LinkedIn marketing skills with verified 2026 hook formulas, comment + reply templates that earn author replies, a 20-point pre-publish algorithm check, AI-tell humanizer (with bundled emoji-detector, detector-spread tester, and rule-explainer sub-tools), profile rewriter, content planner, employee advocacy playbook, and engagement monitor (Kevin Payne window thread tracking + likers / commenters ICP analytics).
